title: Celestial Horizons
description: Adds 170 Biomes ,1 new dimension and 20 blank presets for map making. Alpha v1.0 is designed for mapmaking.
body:
This datapack adds 170 biomes, 1 new dimension and 20 blank biomes for map making customization.

# IMPORTANT 

_**As of V1.0 Alpha,the pack is designed for creative,since biomes won't generate naturally, and instead are used to change foliage/water colors in existing worlds. World generation is planned for a future release.**_

**If you want to experience how biomes are intended to look for v1.0 Release you can check out my "Lands of Mythria" map available to download on the following link: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/lands-of-mythria-170-biomes-25-5k-x-28k/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/lands-of-mythria-170-biomes-25-5k-x-28k/)

## Information

The biomes introduced take inspiration from real world biomes/zones/countries, as well as fantasy concepts. Around 30 biomes in the pack are underwater, 13~ cave biomes, 5~ floating island biomes, and the rest are designed for the surface overworld,nether and end.

There are also **_"presets"_** which act like a plains biome (in terms of spawns and foliage/water colors), and are designed for mapmakers to introduce biome dependent textures. For example there is "city preset 1" which if used along a custom resourcepack allows a server/world to have city textures per zones. There are around 20 presets.

Biomes can be set using different tools. Here are the 3 most common/best ones that I recommend:

- **Vanilla:** use /fillbiome x y z ~ ~ ~ celestialhorizons:<biomename>.  ("x y z" represent first set of coordinates and "~ ~ ~" the second set)
- **World Edit:** after making a selection use //setbiome celestialhorizons:<biomename>
- **Axiom:** Enter Editor UI, select "Biome Painter" Tool and select the biome from the menu.

## Celestial Horizons optional Resource Pack

Along the development of this datapack, I also made a resourcepack and a map to bring all of them together. The resourcepack can be found on this page:[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/celestial-horizons-resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/celestial-horizons-resourcepack)

Just make sure to download the correct version as there is a Full version and a LITE version. (Full version is still in development)
